tasks.subject: Task 1: Data Types & Fetch Mapping
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `depositPrice` to both TypeScript types and map it in the fetch action.

**Files:**
- Modify: `types.ts`
- Modify: `lib/actions/fetch-events.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `FirebaseEventsDocument` has `DepositPrice?: number`
- [ ] `Event` has `depositPrice?: number`
- [ ] `fetchEvents()` maps `data.DepositPrice` → `depositPrice`
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes

**Verify:** `npm run lint` → exits 0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["types.ts", "lib/actions/fetch-events.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["FirebaseEventsDocument has DepositPrice?: number", "Event has depositPrice?: number", "fetchEvents maps data.DepositPrice to depositPrice", "npm run lint passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Server Actions — Validate, Create, Update
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Make validation, create, and update server actions handle `depositPrice` correctly.

**Files:**
- Modify: `lib/actions/validate-event.ts`
- Modify: `lib/actions/create-event.ts`
- Modify: `lib/actions/update-event.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Validation rejects depositPrice ≤ 0 or ≥ price
- [ ] createEvent accepts depositPrice string, applies tax, stores DepositPrice in Firestore when valid
- [ ] updateEvent writes DepositPrice or FieldValue.delete() when undefined
- [ ] `npm run build` passes

**Verify:** `npm run build` → exits 0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/actions/validate-event.ts", "lib/actions/create-event.ts", "lib/actions/update-event.ts"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Validation rejects depositPrice <= 0 or >= price", "createEvent handles depositPrice with tax", "updateEvent uses FieldValue.delete() when undefined", "npm run build passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Create Event Form UI
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add deposit toggle + amount input to the Create Event form and show deposit in the preview dialog.

**Files:**
- Modify: `app/create-event/create-event-client.tsx`
- Modify: `app/create-event/create-event-preview.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Enable deposit checkbox below sales tax checkbox
- [ ] Checking reveals deposit amount input with live tax preview
- [ ] Unchecking clears deposit value
- [ ] Copy-from reverse-calculates base deposit
- [ ] Preview shows deposit and full price
- [ ] `npm run build` passes

**Verify:** `npm run build` → exits 0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/create-event/create-event-client.tsx", "app/create-event/create-event-preview.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Enable deposit checkbox below sales tax checkbox", "Checking reveals deposit amount input with tax preview", "Unchecking clears deposit value", "Copy-from reverse-calculates base deposit", "Preview shows deposit and full price", "npm run build passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Modify Event Form UI
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add deposit toggle + amount input to the Modify Event form.

**Files:**
- Modify: `app/modify-event/modify-event-client.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Deposit price row in edit card below price row
- [ ] Checkbox controls deposit enable/disable; input appears when checked
- [ ] Pre-populates from existing event's depositPrice
- [ ] Unchecking sets depositPrice to undefined
- [ ] `npm run build` passes

**Verify:** `npm run build` → exits 0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/modify-event/modify-event-client.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Deposit price row in edit card", "Checkbox controls deposit enable/disable", "Pre-populates from existing event", "Unchecking sets depositPrice to undefined", "npm run build passes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: View All Events Display
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace single price row with Deposit price and Full price rows in the View All Events detail card.

**Files:**
- Modify: `app/view-all-events/view-all-events-client.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Deposit price row shows amount or N/A
- [ ] Full price row shows ticket price
- [ ] Old price row removed
- [ ] `npm run build` passes

**Verify:** `npm run build` → exits 0

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/view-all-events/view-all-events-client.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Deposit price row shows amount or N/A", "Full price row shows ticket price", "Old price row removed", "npm run build passes"]}
```
